title: The anti-dumping measure on wall-mounted split air conditioners originating from the People's Republic of China will continue
bodyHtml:
As a result of the final review investigation initiated for the importation of "wall-mounted split air conditioners," "outdoor units of wall-mounted split air conditioners (excluding outdoor units of variable refrigerant flow split air conditioner systems)," and "indoor units of wall-mounted split air conditioners" originating from the People's Republic of China, and conducted by the Directorate General of Imports of the Ministry of Trade, it has been decided to continue the anti-dumping measure, which is applied as 25% of the CIF value.

Click here for the Communiqué on the Prevention of Unfair Competition in Imports (No: 2024/15).
